title: Thean Kudikka Lyrics TeeJay Ft Pragathi

kan moodi thirakkum

thaen kudikka

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Thean Kudikka?

The song conveys themes of love and longing, expressing deep emotional connections between partners.

In which movie is Thean Kudikka featured?

The movie for this song is currently unknown.

Who are the singers of Thean Kudikka?

The song features the talented voices of TeeJay and Pragathi.

When was Thean Kudikka released?

The song was published on December 23, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Thean Kudikka is a heartfelt duet that encapsulates the emotions of love and connection. With its soothing melody and romantic lyrics, it evokes feelings of joy and warmth. The collaboration between TeeJay and Pragathi brings a unique charm to the track, making it perfect for intimate moments. This song is a celebration of love, ideal for occasions like anniversaries and weddings.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Thean Kudikka is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of romance and connection. Featuring the enchanting voices of TeeJay and Pragathi, this song is sure to resonate with anyone who has experienced love. Its soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics make it a perfect addition to any romantic playlist.
stanzaMeanings: You have been hidden in the speed of the light.
Even if you are next to me, you are still far away.
The honey moon has come down from the sky and is shining on the ground.
At the moment when I open my eyes, I forget the honey and enjoy the moon.
Look at my heart a little, let it speak too.
The sound is echoing, let it speak a little too.
When I touch and look, it makes me feel a bit shy about my age.
I like your face, let me look at it and speak too.
The time to drink honey is slowly passing, my heart is beating low.
If I had to choose between loving or breathing, I would choose my last breath to say I love you.
Your fragrance is blowing over me like a flower blooming in the wind.
My desire is fulfilled again and again.
In the darkness, there is a playful sound like a whisper.
Your name is echoing in my heart.
With my moonlight, I have made a beautiful scene with my tears.
I think of you even when the sun is shining and the rain is falling.
The light is darkening, I am surrounded by your fingers.
I have not slept in the dark, my dear, I am feeling sweet.
The time to drink honey is slowly passing, my heart is beating low.
If I had to choose between loving or breathing, I would choose my last breath to say I love you.
Don't leave me, don't leave me, I will always be with you, my dear.
Don't leave me, don't leave me, I will give you honey.
The honey moon has come down from the sky and is shining on the ground.
At the moment when I open my eyes, I forget the honey and enjoy the moon.
The time to drink honey is slowly passing, my heart is beating low.
If I had to choose between loving or breathing, I would choose my last breath to say I love you.
